text.title: Meta Ads Creative Strategy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the artefact produced by ads-meta-creative. Validator enforces required keys and per-field constraints; downstream automation refuses to consume outputs that fail the schema.

example.note: Hook too short; value_prop generic; CTA noun-led; only 1 variant; landscape format; cadence outside range.

antipattern.description: cta starts with a noun ('Pricing', 'Free demo').
variants array has fewer than 3 items.
